meaning: n.金银丝织品,华而不实,金属箔adj.闪亮的,俗丽的,华而不实的vt.用金箔装饰
examples: The tinsel and the holly were decorating the drug store.
The golden star of tinsel was still on the top of the Tree, and glittered in the sunshine.
And the tinsel and the Holly were decorating the drug store.
Though all are Jews, Christmas is being celebrated with food and wine and tinsel.
Anyone with a tinsel allergy might also point to the importance of Christmas to the retail trade.
